rule_definition: Every required column from mt_point_tables_schema contract exists in produced tables
Columns marked required YES must be populated according to contract except allowed NaN semantics for derived optional outputs
pass_criteria: No missing required fields violating contract

rule_definition: Row counts must match exactly across RAW CLEAN DERIVED
Immutable key file_id_plus_row_index unique within each point table
Joins performed only on file_id and row_index not on T_K H_Oe time_s
pass_criteria: Join audit confirms immutable key only

rule_definition: Clean rows must carry M_emu_raw M_emu_clean and diagnostic trace fields enabling backtrace to raw
M_emu_smooth cannot replace M_emu_clean unless explicitly declared by downstream method provenance
Derived computations consume only clean columns and explicit metadata columns present in clean table
time_s treated as imported seconds channel and not implicitly elapsed
pass_criteria: No implicit elapsed assumption without time_rel_s

rule_definition: Segment fields are annotation layer and not part of cleaning transform semantics
Each observable row includes source_columns aggregation_method definition and temperature_dependence
